name: manikyam-agriculture-hardware-platform
description: Full-stack local business commerce and operations platform for M/S Manikyam Agriculture Hardware, Electrical & Cement.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace apps/api" "npm run dev --workspace apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace apps/api && npm run build --workspace apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace apps/web && npm run lint --workspace apps/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace apps/api && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/web
